section.heading: Office of Advocacy within Small Business Administration; Chief Counsel for Advocacy

content.p: There is established within the Small Business Administration an Office of Advocacy. The management of the Office shall be vested in a Chief Counsel for Advocacy who shall be appointed from civilian life by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was not enacted as part of the Small Business Act which comprises this chapter.
